zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Stuteville於1154年出生在英國越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯時，她的父親Roger de Stuteville I35歲，母親Agnes15歲。她和Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1202年4月在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯 卡素享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Stuteville was born in 1154, in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger de Stuteville I, was 35 and her mother, Agnes, was 15. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth. She died in April 1202, in Morpeth Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Stuteville est née en 1154, à Burton Agnes, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Stuteville I, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth. Elle est décédée en avril 1202, à Morpeth Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Stuteville 1154 in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Stuteville I 35 und ihre Mutter Agnes 15. Sie hatte mit Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1202 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Morpeth Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Stuteville è nata il nel 1154 nel Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Stuteville I, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth. Morì nel aprile 1202, nel Morpeth Castle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Stutevilleが1154年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブルトン アグネスで生まれた時，父Roger de Stuteville Iは35歳，母Agnesは15歳であった。彼女はRoger de Merlay Lord Morpethとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1202年4月にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペス カストルで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberlan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Stuteville(이)가 1154년 영국 요르크실르 버턴 애그니스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Stuteville I(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1202년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 카스틀에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Stuteville nasceu em 1154, em Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Stuteville I, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth. Ela faleceu em abril de 1202, em Morpeth Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberlan: нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Stuteville родилась в 1154 г. в местности буртон агнесь, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Stuteville I было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 15. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Roger de Merlay Lord Morpeth. Она умерла апрель 1202 г. в местности морпет кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
